case_title: PEI ZHU YU VS. TIRZAH WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, PEI ZHU
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, PEI ZHU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TIRZAH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
